decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28. The SafeCounter type and the Add rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: Add increases counts[key] by n (so Add('x', 3) then Add('x', 2) makes Get('x') == 5).
The change modifies only counter/counter.go and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It guards the shared map mutation with the receiver's c.mu (Lock then Unlock, e.g. via defer) exactly like Inc and Get, so the method stays safe for concurrent use — not unlocked, and not using a new/local mutex.
Signature, doc comment, and style match Inc and Get.
